title: boesenbergia ochroleuca
intro: Boesenbergia ochroleuca, also known as Curcuma ochroleuca or Lemon Ginger Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family, Zingiberaceae. The medicinal properties of Boesenbergia ochroleuca include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid digestion, reduce nausea and vomiting, and provide relief from headaches and fever. Boesenbergia ochroleuca can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
